'''Code 497.8''' was a law of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the ruling government of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at the time, mandating that a [[Junior Representative/Legends|representative]] of the Republic would have to leave a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] if ordered to do so by that planet's leadership.<ref name="TCD" />

==Behind the scenes==
This law made an only appearance in the [[2004]] novel, ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'', by [[Steven Barnes]].<ref name="TCD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
